description.en: Get engagement metrics (likes, comments, shares, impressions) for a LinkedIn post.
description.de: Engagement-Metriken (Likes, Kommentare, Shares, Impressionen) für einen LinkedIn-Beitrag abrufen.
description.es: Obtenga métricas de participación (me gusta, comentarios, acciones compartidas, impresiones) para una publicación de LinkedIn.
description.fr: Obtenez des mesures d'engagement (j'aime, commentaires, partages, impressions) pour une publication LinkedIn.
description.ro: Obțineți valori de implicare (aprecieri, comentarii, distribuiri, impresii) pentru o postare pe LinkedIn.
description.it: Ottieni metriche di coinvolgimento (Mi piace, commenti, condivisioni, impressioni) per un post di LinkedIn.

vars.ACCESS_TOKEN: env:LINKEDIN_ACCESS_TOKEN|Your LinkedIn OAuth 2.0 Access Token with r_organization_social or r_member_social scope.

inputs.name: Post URN

description.en: The URN of the post (e.g., 'urn:li:share:12345' or 'urn:li:ugcPost:12345').
description.es: La URN de la publicación (por ejemplo, 'urn:li:share:12345' o 'urn:li:ugcPost:12345').
description.fr: L'URN de la publication (par exemple, 'urn:li:share:12345' ou 'urn:li:ugcPost:12345').

inputs.bot: The LinkedIn post URN. Get this from the list-posts warp. URL-encode if needed.

success.en: Comments: {{COMMENTS}} ({{TOP_LEVEL_COMMENTS}} top-level). Reactions breakdown available in output.
success.de: Kommentare: {{COMMENTS}} ({{TOP_LEVEL_COMMENTS}} Top-Level). Reaktionsaufschlüsselung in der Ausgabe verfügbar.
success.es: Comentarios: {{COMMENTS}} ({{TOP_LEVEL_COMMENTS}} nivel superior). Desglose de reacciones disponible en la salida.
success.fr: Commentaires : {{COMMENTS}} ({{TOP_LEVEL_COMMENTS}} niveau supérieur). Répartition des réactions disponible en sortie.
success.ro: Comentarii: {{COMMENTS}} ({{TOP_LEVEL_COMMENTS}} nivel superior). Defalcarea reacțiilor disponibilă în ieșire.
success.it: Commenti: {{COMMENTS}} ({{TOP_LEVEL_COMMENTS}} livello superiore). Ripartizione delle reazioni disponibile nell'output.
